ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI associated with the organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label representing the organization */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., local authority, private developer) */,
  "organisation_address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the managing organization */,
  "site_reference" INTEGER /* Reference number for the site */,
  "previously_part_of" INTEGER /* Information on previous ownership or association */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan document */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Geographical coordinate reference system */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* East coordinate (X) */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* North coordinate (Y) */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Area of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Status of ownership */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., brownfield, greenfield) */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of site (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current planning status of the deliverable */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when permission was granted */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the deliverable was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliverables_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* Detailed description of the planning history */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the planning application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the planning decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_histories_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposed_developments" (
  "proposed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposed development */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings proposed */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed development */,
  "non_housing_development" TEXT /* Details on any non-housing development */,
  "projected_start_date" TEXT /* Projected start date of the development */,
  "projected_end_date" TEXT /* Projected end date of the development */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposed_developments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_information" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site information entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the site */,
  "site_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the site (e.g., vacant, occupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_information_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was first added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was last updated */,
  "site_acquired_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., public authority, private) */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., granted, pending) */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current status of planning regarding permission */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* East coordinate (X) */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* North coordinate (Y) */,
  "geo_z" REAL /* Height coordinate (Z) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_substances" (
  "hazardous_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous substance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "substance_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazardous substance */,
  "concentration_level" TEXT /* Level of concentration (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazardous_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_substances_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental impact record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated site */,
  "feedback_description" TEXT /* Description of the community feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
